overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night in a video game. The player uses a flashlight to illuminate a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation and trees, passing a large tree trunk and approaching a rock formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with dense undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the dark forest path with a flashlight illuminating the ground ahead

entered.detail: thick green bushes and shrubs lining the left side of the path
narrow dirt trail with scattered leaves and grass
tall straight tree trunk visible ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path in a dark forest at night, with dense undergrowth bushes visible on the left side illuminated by the flashlight. The path leads toward a tall tree trunk visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: large tree trunk passes very close on the right side, dominating the peripheral view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing closely by the large tree trunk on the right side while maintaining steady forward movement

entered.detail: small dry branches and twigs scattered on the ground near the tree base

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the dense bushes and approaches the large tree trunk, which now dominates the right side of the frame. Fallen branches are visible on the ground near the tree as the camera passes closely by it, with the tree trunk temporarily filling the right side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with rocky cliff wall

events.description: large rock formation becomes visible on the left, replacing the dense vegetation with rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the path with the rock wall now illuminated on the left side, moving deeper into the forest

entered.detail: large rocky cliff face with rough brown texture rising steeply on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the tree, the scene reveals a large rock formation on the left side of the path, replacing the previous dense vegetation. The camera continues moving forward along the dirt trail, with the illuminated rock wall prominent on the left and the passed tree now visible further behind on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark forest path that shifts from dense undergrowth to a prominent rock formation. It begins by navigating a narrow dirt trail, with a flashlight illuminating thick bushes on the left as the camera advances toward a distant tree. As the camera moves forward, the view shifts to the right where a massive tree trunk dominates the frame, passing closely by fallen branches scattered across the ground. The scene then opens up as the camera clears the tree, revealing a large, illuminated rock wall that replaces the vegetation on the left side of the path. Finally, the camera continues its forward progression along the trail, leaving the tree behind in the darkness while the rock formation remains prominent in the light.
